comment: Sync-bus heartbeat. Each node updates its entry on every push. See .sync/BUS.md.

claude-local.focus: Beat-jump fix (1.7.10): splice now on next BAR line (was next beat) so cuts land musically; +latency-anchored start, equal-power 8ms fade, dropout guard fix.
